description: Perform a K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN) regression analysis on the Exam Anxiety dataset located at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv. Set 'Exam' as the target variable and 'Anxiety' and 'Revise' as the feature variables. Configure the model with 5 nearest neighbors, an 80% training/20% test data split, and a seed of 42. Include a 'Predicted vs. Observed' plot in the output and save the analysis to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/knn_exam_results.jasp.
